"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\MotorPWMDashboard.dir/objects.a
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\MotorPWMDashboard.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\MotorPWMDashboard.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\c++.exe -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\MotorPWMDashboard.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o MotorPWMDashboard.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libMotorPWMDashboard.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\MotorPWMDashboard.dir\linkLibs.rsp
